headline: Corning Meta Fiber Expansion Deepens Ties To AI Data Center Growth
summary: Corning (NYSE:GLW) and Meta have started a $6b expansion of Corning's optical cable plant in North Carolina. The project is intended to support AI data center growth and strengthen US based fiber supply. The expansion represents a multi year commitment between Corning and a large technology partner focused on AI infrastructure. Corning, trading at $158.26, has seen very strong share price performance, with the stock up 74.5% year to date and 251.1% over the past year. The new expansion with...
